## Install / Package
- NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@shahboura/agents-claude
- GitHub Releases: https://github.com/shahboura/agents-claude/releases

## Agent Inventory
- @codebase
- @orchestrator
- @planner
- @review
- @docs
- @em-advisor
- @blogger
- @brutal-critic

## Skill Categories
- Language skills: dotnet, python, typescript, flutter, go, java-spring, node-express, react-next, ruby-rails, rust, sql-migrations
- Utility skills: project-bootstrap, agent-diagnostics, docs-validation, ux-responsive
- Content skills: blogger, brutal-critic
- Command-style workflow skills: api-docs, architecture-decision, architecture-review, blog-post, code-review, content-review, create-readme, generate-tests, plan-project, refactor-plan, security-audit, 1-on-1-prep

## Quick Facts
- Skills are loaded on demand.
- Keep one primary skill per phase unless cross-domain work is needed.
- Installer supports global/project scopes with safe settings merge and manifest-backed uninstall.
